market_note: Stablecoin market cap has slipped ~$10B since its May peak as GENIUS Act rules near their July 18 finalization deadline.

stablecoin_items.headline: GENIUS Act rules due July 18
stablecoin_items.summary: Six federal agencies are in the final stretch to finalize GENIUS Act stablecoin rules by the July 18 statutory deadline, including a $5M capital floor for issuers.

stablecoin_items.headline: Circle wins OCC bank charter
stablecoin_items.summary: Circle received OCC approval to operate as a national trust bank, letting it directly manage USDC reserves; shares surged on the news.

stablecoin_items.headline: Visa, BlackRock back rival 'Open USD' stablecoin
stablecoin_items.summary: Over 140 companies launched a fee-free, shared-governance dollar stablecoin, prompting Circle's stock to fall more than 10% on competitive concerns.

stablecoin_items.headline: Stablecoin market cap contracts $10B since May
stablecoin_items.summary: Total stablecoin supply is down roughly 3% from its peak; analysts say the pullback is mild compared to prior bear-market contractions.

hack_items.headline: 'Ill Bloom' flaw drains $5M+ from wallets
hack_items.summary: Coinspect disclosed a weak-randomness bug in recovery-phrase generation across five wallet implementations; confirmed losses now exceed $5 million.

hack_items.headline: Hundreds of MetaMask/EVM wallets drained
hack_items.summary: A wave of fake 'wallet update' prompts tricked users into signing malicious transactions, draining hundreds of EVM-based wallets.

hack_items.headline: White-hat researchers flag $70B Aptos risk
hack_items.summary: Hexens researchers found an Aptos consensus flaw with a near-90% exploit success rate and attack costs of just hundreds of dollars; patched before abuse.

hack_items.headline: Q2 2026 named worst quarter ever for crypto hacks
hack_items.summary: Crypto losses hit a record 70 separate exploits in Q2, per new industry data, even as total dollar losses stayed below prior-year peaks.
